package com.rehealth.genie.features

import com.rehealth.genie.network.PatientProfilePayload
import com.rehealth.genie.ring.data.RingActivityEntity
import com.rehealth.genie.ring.data.RingMeasurementEntity
import com.rehealth.genie.ring.data.RingSleepSessionEntity
import java.time.Instant
import java.time.LocalDate
import java.time.ZoneOffset

data class HealthMemorySnapshot(
    val profile: BaselineHealthProfile? = null,
    val labs: ClinicalLabValues? = null,
    val ringMeasurements: List<RingMeasurementEntity> = emptyList(),
    val ringActivities: List<RingActivityEntity> = emptyList(),
    val ringSleepSessions: List<RingSleepSessionEntity> = emptyList(),
    val interviewBaselineText: String? = null,
    val interviewUpdatedAt: Long? = null,
) {
    val sleepSummary: SleepSummary?
        get() = summarizeSleep(ringSleepSessions)

    companion object {
        fun fromPatientProfile(
            profile: PatientProfilePayload?,
            labs: ClinicalLabValues? = null,
            ringMeasurements: List<RingMeasurementEntity> = emptyList(),
            ringActivities: List<RingActivityEntity> = emptyList(),
            ringSleepSessions: List<RingSleepSessionEntity> = emptyList(),
            interviewBaselineText: String? = null,
            interviewUpdatedAt: Long? = null,
        ): HealthMemorySnapshot =
            HealthMemorySnapshot(
                profile = profile?.let {
                    BaselineHealthProfile(
                        age = it.age,
                        gender = it.gender,
                        heightCm = it.heightCm,
                        weightKg = it.weightKg,
                        bmi = it.bmi,
                        smoking = it.smoking,
                        drinking = it.drinking,
                        diabetesHistory = it.diabetesHistory,
                        hypertensionHistory = it.hypertensionHistory,
                        familyHistory = it.familyHistory,
                        updatedAt = it.updatedAt,
                    )
                },
                labs = labs,
                ringMeasurements = ringMeasurements,
                ringActivities = ringActivities,
                ringSleepSessions = ringSleepSessions,
                interviewBaselineText = interviewBaselineText,
                interviewUpdatedAt = interviewUpdatedAt,
            )
    }
}

data class BaselineHealthProfile(
    val age: Int? = null,
    val gender: String? = null,
    val heightCm: Double? = null,
    val weightKg: Double? = null,
    val bmi: Double? = null,
    val smoking: Boolean? = null,
    val drinking: Boolean? = null,
    val diabetesHistory: Boolean? = null,
    val hypertensionHistory: Boolean? = null,
    val familyHistory: Boolean? = null,
    val updatedAt: Long? = null,
)

data class ClinicalLabValues(
    val fastingGlucose: Double? = null,
    val totalCholesterol: Double? = null,
    val ldl: Double? = null,
    val hdl: Double? = null,
    val triglycerides: Double? = null,
    val recordedAt: Long? = null,
)

data class SleepSummary(
    val latestTotalMinutes: Int,
    val latestEndedAt: Long,
    val sevenDayAverageMinutes: Double,
    val nights: Int,
)

private fun summarizeSleep(sessions: List<RingSleepSessionEntity>): SleepSummary? {
    val validSessions = sessions
        .filter { it.endedAt > it.startedAt }
        .mapNotNull { session ->
            val total = session.deepMinutes + session.lightMinutes + session.remMinutes
            if (total <= 0) null else session to total
        }
        .sortedByDescending { it.first.endedAt }
    val latest = validSessions.firstOrNull() ?: return null
    val latestDate = Instant.ofEpochMilli(latest.first.endedAt).atZone(ZoneOffset.UTC).toLocalDate()
    val recent = validSessions.filter { (session, _) ->
        val date = Instant.ofEpochMilli(session.endedAt).atZone(ZoneOffset.UTC).toLocalDate()
        !date.isBefore(latestDate.minusDays(6))
    }
    return SleepSummary(
        latestTotalMinutes = latest.second,
        latestEndedAt = latest.first.endedAt,
        sevenDayAverageMinutes = recent.map { it.second }.average(),
        nights = recent.map { it.first.endedAt.toUtcDate() }.distinct().size,
    )
}

private fun Long.toUtcDate(): LocalDate =
    Instant.ofEpochMilli(this).atZone(ZoneOffset.UTC).toLocalDate()

package com.rehealth.genie.sync

import android.content.Context
import androidx.room.withTransaction
import com.rehealth.genie.BuildConfig
import com.rehealth.genie.data.AppDatabase
import com.rehealth.genie.ring.data.RingActivityEntity
import com.rehealth.genie.ring.data.RingMeasurementEntity
import com.rehealth.genie.ring.data.RingSignalChunkEntity
import com.rehealth.genie.ring.data.RingSleepSessionEntity
import com.squareup.moshi.JsonAdapter
import com.squareup.moshi.Moshi
import com.squareup.moshi.kotlin.reflect.KotlinJsonAdapterFactory
import java.util.Base64
import java.util.UUID

class MeasurementSyncRepository(
    context: Context,
    private val database: AppDatabase,
    private val rawSignalUploadEnabled: Boolean = BuildConfig.REHEALTH_RAW_SIGNAL_UPLOAD_ENABLED,
    private val clock: () -> Long = System::currentTimeMillis,
) {
    private val settings = MeasurementSyncSettings(context)
    private val identity = MeasurementSyncIdentity(context)
    private val adapter: JsonAdapter<MeasurementBatchDto> = Moshi.Builder()
        .add(KotlinJsonAdapterFactory())
        .build()
        .adapter(MeasurementBatchDto::class.java)

    suspend fun enqueueNextBatch(limitPerType: Int = DEFAULT_LIMIT_PER_TYPE): UploadQueueEntity? {
        if (settings.isAuthPaused() || database.uploadQueueDao().countBlocking() > 0) {
            return null
        }
        val persistedCursor = database.uploadQueueDao().latestDoneCollectedTo() ?: 0L
        val cursor = maxOf(settings.lastSyncedAt(), persistedCursor)
        return database.withTransaction {
            if (database.uploadQueueDao().countBlocking() > 0) {
                return@withTransaction null
            }
            val ringDao = database.ringDataDao()
            val measurements = ringDao.getMeasurementsSince(cursor, limitPerType)
            val sleepSessions = ringDao.getSleepSessionsSince(cursor, limitPerType)
            val activities = ringDao.getActivitiesSince(cursor, limitPerType)
            val signalChunks = if (rawSignalUploadEnabled) {
                ringDao.getSignalChunksSince(cursor, RAW_SIGNAL_LIMIT)
            } else {
                emptyList()
            }
            if (measurements.isEmpty() && sleepSessions.isEmpty() && activities.isEmpty() && signalChunks.isEmpty()) {
                return@withTransaction null
            }

            val safeHighWatermark = safeHighWatermark(
                measurements = measurements,
                sleepSessions = sleepSessions,
                activities = activities,
                signalChunks = signalChunks,
                regularLimit = limitPerType,
            )
            val boundedMeasurements = measurements.filter { it.measuredAt <= safeHighWatermark }
            val boundedSleepSessions = sleepSessions.filter { it.startedAt <= safeHighWatermark }
            val boundedActivities = activities.filter { it.startedAt <= safeHighWatermark }
            val boundedSignalChunks = signalChunks.filter { it.startedAt <= safeHighWatermark }
            val batchId = UUID.randomUUID().toString()
            val batch = MeasurementBatchFactory.create(
                batchId = batchId,
                userId = identity.userId(),
                deviceId = identity.deviceId(),
                measurements = boundedMeasurements,
                sleepSessions = boundedSleepSessions,
                activities = boundedActivities,
                signalChunks = boundedSignalChunks,
                rawSignalUploadEnabled = rawSignalUploadEnabled,
            )
            val entity = UploadQueueEntity(
                id = UUID.randomUUID().toString(),
                payloadType = PAYLOAD_TYPE,
                payloadJson = adapter.toJson(batch),
                batchId = batchId,
                collectedTo = batch.collectedTo,
                createdAt = clock(),
            )
            database.uploadQueueDao().insert(entity)
            entity
        }
    }

    suspend fun resetInterruptedUploads() {
        database.uploadQueueDao().resetInterrupted()
    }

    suspend fun claimNext(): UploadQueueEntity? {
        val next = database.uploadQueueDao().nextPending() ?: return null
        return if (database.uploadQueueDao().markSyncing(next.id, clock()) == 1) {
            next.copy(
                status = UploadQueueStatus.SYNCING,
                attemptCount = next.attemptCount + 1,
                lastAttemptAt = clock(),
            )
        } else {
            null
        }
    }

    fun decode(entity: UploadQueueEntity): MeasurementBatchDto? =
        runCatching { adapter.fromJson(entity.payloadJson) }.getOrNull()

    suspend fun markDone(entity: UploadQueueEntity) {
        database.uploadQueueDao().markDone(entity.id)
        settings.advanceCursor(entity.collectedTo)
    }

    suspend fun markRetryable(entity: UploadQueueEntity, errorCode: String) {
        database.uploadQueueDao().markRetryable(entity.id, errorCode)
    }

    suspend fun markFailed(entity: UploadQueueEntity, errorCode: String) {
        database.uploadQueueDao().markFailed(entity.id, errorCode)
    }

    fun pauseForAuthentication() {
        settings.pauseForAuthentication()
    }

    suspend fun purgeOldDone() {
        database.uploadQueueDao().purgeDoneBefore(clock() - DONE_RETENTION_MS)
    }

    companion object {
        private const val PAYLOAD_TYPE = "TELEMETRY_BATCH"
        private const val DEFAULT_LIMIT_PER_TYPE = 1000
        private const val RAW_SIGNAL_LIMIT = 100
        private const val DONE_RETENTION_MS = 7L * 24L * 60L * 60L * 1000L

        internal fun safeHighWatermark(
            measurements: List<RingMeasurementEntity>,
            sleepSessions: List<RingSleepSessionEntity>,
            activities: List<RingActivityEntity>,
            signalChunks: List<RingSignalChunkEntity>,
            regularLimit: Int,
        ): Long {
            val allTimestamps = buildList {
                measurements.forEach { add(it.measuredAt) }
                sleepSessions.forEach { add(it.startedAt) }
                activities.forEach { add(it.startedAt) }
                signalChunks.forEach { add(it.startedAt) }
            }
            val saturatedHighWatermarks = buildList {
                if (measurements.size >= regularLimit) add(measurements.maxOf { it.measuredAt })
                if (sleepSessions.size >= regularLimit) add(sleepSessions.maxOf { it.startedAt })
                if (activities.size >= regularLimit) add(activities.maxOf { it.startedAt })
                if (signalChunks.size >= RAW_SIGNAL_LIMIT) add(signalChunks.maxOf { it.startedAt })
            }
            return saturatedHighWatermarks.minOrNull() ?: allTimestamps.max()
        }
    }
}

internal object MeasurementBatchFactory {
    fun create(
        batchId: String,
        userId: String,
        deviceId: String,
        measurements: List<RingMeasurementEntity>,
        sleepSessions: List<RingSleepSessionEntity>,
        activities: List<RingActivityEntity>,
        signalChunks: List<RingSignalChunkEntity>,
        rawSignalUploadEnabled: Boolean,
    ): MeasurementBatchDto {
        val timestamps = buildList {
            measurements.forEach { add(it.measuredAt) }
            sleepSessions.forEach { add(it.startedAt) }
            activities.forEach { add(it.startedAt) }
            if (rawSignalUploadEnabled) signalChunks.forEach { add(it.startedAt) }
        }
        require(timestamps.isNotEmpty()) { "Telemetry batch must not be empty." }
        return MeasurementBatchDto(
            batchId = batchId,
            userId = userId,
            deviceId = deviceId,
            collectedFrom = timestamps.min(),
            collectedTo = timestamps.max(),
            measurements = measurements.map {
                MeasurementDto(
                    id = it.id,
                    metricType = it.metricType,
                    measuredAt = it.measuredAt,
                    primaryValue = it.primaryValue,
                    secondaryValue = it.secondaryValue,
                    unit = it.unit,
                    quality = it.quality,
                    source = it.source,
                )
            },
            sleepSessions = sleepSessions.map {
                SleepSessionDto(
                    id = it.id,
                    startedAt = it.startedAt,
                    endedAt = it.endedAt,
                    deepMinutes = it.deepMinutes,
                    lightMinutes = it.lightMinutes,
                    awakeMinutes = it.awakeMinutes,
                    remMinutes = it.remMinutes,
                    interruptionMinutes = it.interruptionMinutes,
                    source = it.source,
                )
            },
            activitySessions = activities.map {
                ActivitySessionDto(
                    id = it.id,
                    startedAt = it.startedAt,
                    endedAt = it.endedAt,
                    activityType = it.activityType,
                    steps = it.steps,
                    distanceMeters = it.distanceMeters,
                    caloriesKcal = it.caloriesKcal,
                    durationMinutes = it.durationMinutes,
                    averageHeartRate = it.averageHeartRate,
                    source = it.source,
                )
            },
            signalChunks = if (rawSignalUploadEnabled) {
                signalChunks.map {
                    SignalChunkDto(
                        id = it.id,
                        signalType = it.signalType,
                        startedAt = it.startedAt,
                        sampleRateHz = it.sampleRateHz,
                        sampleCount = it.sampleCount,
                        encoding = it.encoding,
                        payloadBase64 = Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString(it.payload),
                        source = it.source,
                    )
                }
            } else {
                emptyList()
            },
            quality = mapOf(
                "schemaVersion" to "ring-telemetry-v1",
                "rawSignalUploadEnabled" to rawSignalUploadEnabled,
            ),
        )
    }
}

private class MeasurementSyncIdentity(context: Context) {
    private val preferences = context.applicationContext.getSharedPreferences(PREFERENCES, Context.MODE_PRIVATE)

    fun userId(): String = BuildConfig.REHEALTH_SYNC_USER_ID.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
        ?: stableId(USER_ID_KEY, "local-user")

    fun deviceId(): String = BuildConfig.REHEALTH_SYNC_DEVICE_ID.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
        ?: stableId(DEVICE_ID_KEY, "local-device")

    private fun stableId(key: String, prefix: String): String {
        preferences.getString(key, null)?.let { return it }
        val value = "$prefix-${UUID.randomUUID()}"
        preferences.edit().putString(key, value).commit()
        return value
    }

    companion object {
        private const val PREFERENCES = "measurement_sync_identity"
        private const val USER_ID_KEY = "user_id"
        private const val DEVICE_ID_KEY = "device_id"
    }
}

private class MeasurementSyncSettings(context: Context) {
    private val preferences = context.applicationContext.getSharedPreferences(PREFERENCES, Context.MODE_PRIVATE)

    fun lastSyncedAt(): Long = preferences.getLong(LAST_SYNCED_AT, 0L)

    fun advanceCursor(timestamp: Long) {
        preferences.edit().putLong(LAST_SYNCED_AT, maxOf(lastSyncedAt(), timestamp)).commit()
    }

    fun isAuthPaused(): Boolean = preferences.getBoolean(AUTH_PAUSED, false)

    fun pauseForAuthentication() {
        preferences.edit().putBoolean(AUTH_PAUSED, true).commit()
    }

    companion object {
        private const val PREFERENCES = "measurement_sync"
        private const val LAST_SYNCED_AT = "last_synced_at"
        private const val AUTH_PAUSED = "auth_paused"
    }
}

### 3.3 16 缁寸壒寰佹彁鍙栫畻瀛?

```python
# bodyup_edge_sdk/core/feature_extractor.py

import numpy as np
from datetime import datetime
import math

class HealthFeatureExtractor:
    """16缁寸敓鐞嗙壒寰佹彁鍙?路 绾疌PU 路 鍏煎鎵€鏈夋満鍨?""

    def __init__(self, window_days: int = 14):
        self.window_days = window_days

    def extract_bp_features(self, sbp_hourly: list, dbp_hourly: list) -> dict:
        sbp = np.array(sbp_hourly[-(self.window_days * 24):])
        dbp = np.array(dbp_hourly[-(self.window_days * 24):])

        # 澶滈棿鏉撳瀷鍒ゅ畾
        daily = sbp.reshape(-1, 24)
        night = daily[:, 0:6].mean(axis=1)
        day = daily[:, 10:22].mean(axis=1)
        dip = (day.mean() - night.mean()) / day.mean()

        pattern = ("extreme_dipper" if dip >= 0.20 else
                   "dipper" if dip >= 0.10 else
                   "non_dipper" if dip >= 0.0 else
                   "reverse_dipper")

        slope = np.polyfit(np.arange(len(sbp)), sbp, 1)[0] if len(sbp) > 1 else 0.0

        return {
            "sbp_mean": round(float(np.mean(sbp)), 1),
            "sbp_std": round(float(np.std(sbp)), 1),
            "sbp_slope": round(float(slope), 4),
            "dbp_mean": round(float(np.mean(dbp)), 1),
            "dbp_std": round(float(np.std(dbp)), 1),
            "night_bp_pattern": pattern
        }

    def extract_cardiac_features(self, hr_series: list, hrv_series: list) -> dict:
        hr = np.array(hr_series[-(self.window_days * 24):])
        hrv = np.array(hrv_series[-self.window_days:])
        return {
            "resting_hr_mean": round(float(np.mean(hr)), 1),
            "hrv_rmssd_mean": round(float(np.mean(hrv)), 1)
        }

    def extract_activity_features(self, calories: list, sport_events: list,
                                  sleep_hours: list) -> dict:
        cal = np.array(calories[-self.window_days:])
        sleep = np.array(sleep_hours[-self.window_days:])
        trend = np.polyfit(np.arange(len(cal)), cal, 1)[0] if len(cal) > 1 else 0.0
        return {
            "active_calories_daily_mean": round(float(np.mean(cal)), 1),
            "active_calories_trend": round(float(trend), 4),
            "sport_freq_weekly": round(len(sport_events) / max(self.window_days / 7, 1), 1),
            "sleep_hours_mean": round(float(np.mean(sleep)), 1)
        }

    def encode_time_confounders(self) -> dict:
        now = datetime.now()
        angle = 2 * math.pi * now.timetuple().tm_yday / 365.25
        return {
            "season_sin": round(math.sin(angle), 4),
            "season_cos": round(math.cos(angle), 4),
            "day_of_week": now.weekday(),
            "is_weekend": 1 if now.weekday() >= 5 else 0
        }
```
